title: Thannaane Thamara Poo Lyrics Periyanna
stanzas:
Pacholay Keethukulla
padhungi nikkura pasangalukku
maranji nikkura
paruvam vandhuruchu
maamanukku seiyyum seeru
selavum vanthuruchu

Thannaane thaamara poo
maamaa thalaadum thanniyila
ye thaamara  poothiruche
maamaa thaavani vaangi vaanga

Thannaane thaamara poo
pulla thalaadum thanniyila
ye thaamara  poothiruche
pulla thaavani vaangi vaaren

kottura paniyila naanum
unakku kodaiya marattumaa
un vettura vizhiyila moottura
neruppula kulirum kaayatumaa

unakku enakku manasu ippa
vaikka piriyaachu
oliva maraiva pesi sirikka
oada thunaiyaachu

kaiyyila anaikkura podhu
nee thulli kudhikkira maanu
aathula kulikkira podhu
nee aala kadikkura meenu

un iduppu seela nazhuva
naan eduthu eduthu thazhuva

ye Thannaane thaamara poo
maamaa thalaadum thanniyila
ye thaamara  poothiruche
pulla thaavani vaangi vaaren

thinamum enna thorathuthaiya
unga perum moochu
aththi pooththa maayam pola
maamaa un pechu

kanne unakku minmini pudichi
velakkaa yethatumaa
vidiyira varaikkum madiyila
saanji vishiyam sollattumaa

maaman tharanum seeru
rendu maangaa thattu thoadu
nee sirikkura thanga thaeru
un thevai enna kelu

vedala pulla naanum
oru vevaram ketka vendum.

Thannaane thaamara poo
pulla thalaadum thanniyila
ye thaamara  poothiruche
maamaa thaavani vaangi vaanga

Thannaane thaamara poo
maamaa thalaadum thanniyila
ye thaamara  poothiruche
pulla thaavani vaangi vaaren

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Thannaane Thamara Poo'?

The song conveys themes of joy and celebration, often reflecting on cherished moments and relationships.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Periyanna'?

In the movie, the song is a joyful celebration that highlights the happiness of the characters and their relationships.

Who are the singers of 'Thannaane Thamara Poo'?

The song features the melodious voices of K.S. Chitra and S.P. Balasubramaniam.

When was 'Thannaane Thamara Poo' released?

The song was released on April 14, 1999.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the song 'Thannaane Thamara Poo' from the movie Periyanna, the lyrics celebrate the joy of togetherness and the beauty of relationships. The melody, sung by the legendary K.S. Chitra and S.P. Balasubramaniam, evokes a sense of nostalgia and happiness. The song's vibrant energy and heartfelt lyrics make it a perfect fit for celebrations and gatherings. It captures the essence of joyful moments, leaving listeners with a warm feeling of love and camaraderie.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thannaane Thamara Poo is a delightful melody that captures the essence of joy and nostalgia, showcasing the beautiful collaboration of K.S. Chitra and S.P. Balasubramaniam. This enchanting song from the movie Periyanna resonates with listeners, evoking memories of cherished moments. Experience the magic of this timeless classic that continues to warm hearts even today.
stanzaMeanings: The boys who are sitting under the trees are now in their youth, and the fun that comes with it has arrived.
You are the lotus flower, and in your own way, you have blossomed like a lotus. Come, let’s take the flower.
Everyone gather together and come, let’s play the music.
You are the lotus flower, and in your own way, you have blossomed like a lotus. Come, let’s take the flower.
In the work of the house, can I give you a gift? In your home, will the coolness of the fire be a comfort?
You and I have a connection now; it feels like we can’t be separated. Talking and laughing together has become a support.
When you hold something in your hand, you jump and drink. When you bathe in the water, you catch fish.
I will take your waist and hold it close.
You are the lotus flower, and in your own way, you have blossomed like a lotus. Come, let’s take the flower.
Every day, your big presence is like a magical flower that blooms; your words are enchanting.
My dear, do you have any light to hold on to until dawn? Can you tell me something about the situation?
The uncle gives a command, and you laugh while playing. What do you need from me?
I need to ask a question.
You are the lotus flower, and in your own way, you have blossomed like a lotus. Come, let’s take the flower.
Everyone gather together, and I will come to play the music.
You are the lotus flower, and in your own way, you have blossomed like a lotus. Come, let’s take the flower.
